title: Living Tiles
description: A reference-dependent series: one base tessellation tile followed by three material and subject variations preserving the same seamless geometry.
creative_direction: True geometry-continuity series: image 01 establishes the interlocking tile lattice; images 02-04 depend on 01 as --ref and reinterpret the same seamless structure through coral, moth, and city materials.

generation_plan.ref_strategy: Run 01 first. Use its runtime result URL as --ref for 02-04. Queue may run 02-04 concurrently after 01 is done.
generation_plan.index_policy: Only status=done images with image.png are included in works/index.json.

en.title: Living Tiles
en.description: A reference-dependent series: one base tessellation tile followed by three material and subject variations preserving the same seamless geometry.

zh-CN.title: 活体瓷砖
zh-CN.description: 一张基准无缝拼贴图，后续三张以不同材质和主体延续同一几何结构。
